name: Unit Converters
description: Free unit converters for length, weight, temperature, area, volume, data storage, energy, fuel economy, and data transfer rates.
metaDescription: Convert between metric and imperial units for length, weight, area, volume, temperature, and data storage. Instant unit converters, no signup.

subcategories.name: Length
subcategories.description: Convert between units of length and distance.

subcategories.name: Weight
subcategories.description: Convert between units of weight and mass.

subcategories.name: Area
subcategories.description: Convert between units of area measurement.

subcategories.name: Volume
subcategories.description: Convert between units of volume and capacity.

subcategories.name: Data Storage
subcategories.description: Convert between units of digital data storage.

subcategories.name: Speed
subcategories.description: Convert between units of speed and velocity.

subcategories.name: Currency
subcategories.description: Convert between major world currencies with exchange rate and fee calculations.

subcategories.name: Time
subcategories.description: Convert between units of time from seconds to years.

subcategories.name: Angle
subcategories.description: Convert between units of angular measurement.

subcategories.name: Pressure
subcategories.description: Convert between units of pressure and atmospheric measurement.

subcategories.name: Energy
subcategories.description: Convert between units of energy including joules, calories, kWh, and BTU.

subcategories.name: Fuel Economy
subcategories.description: Convert between fuel economy units including MPG, km/L, and L/100km.

subcategories.name: Data Transfer Rate
subcategories.description: Convert between data transfer rate units including Mbps, Gbps, and MB/s.
